memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int j, cdmatrix &G_gtr, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G)
memberdef.name: get_gtr

para.bold: Returns the greater component of a hermitian contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the greater component $ G^>(t_i,t_j) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ t_j$ from $G^<(t_i,t_j)$ and $G^\mathrm{R}(t_i,t_j)$.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

parameterdescription.para: [cdmatrix] The greater component (returned to an eigen3 matrix).

memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int j, cdmatrix &G_gtr, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &Gcc)
memberdef.name: get_gtr

para.bold: Returns the greater component of a general contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the greater component $ G^>(t_i,t_j) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ t_j$ from $G^<(t_i,t_j)$ and $G^\mathrm{R}(t_i,t_j)$.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

parameterdescription.para: [cdmatrix] The greater component (returned to an eigen3 matrix).

memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int j, std::complex< T > &G_gtr, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G)
memberdef.name: get_gtr

para.bold: Returns the greater component of a hermitian contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the greater component $ G^>(t_i,t_j) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ t_j$ from $G^<(t_i,t_j)$ and $G^\mathrm{R}(t_i,t_j)$.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int j, std::complex< T > &G_gtr, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &Gcc)
memberdef.name: get_gtr

para.bold: Returns the greater component of a general contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the greater component $ G^>(t_i,t_j) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ t_j$ from $G^<(t_i,t_j)$ and $G^\mathrm{R}(t_i,t_j)$.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int j, cdmatrix &G_les, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G)
memberdef.name: get_les

para.bold: Returns the lesser component of a hermitian contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the lesser component $ G^<(t_i,t_j) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ t_j$. For $ i > j$ the hermitian symmetry is assumed.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

parameterdescription.para: [cdmatrix] The lesser component (returned to an eigen3 matrix).

memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int j, cdmatrix &G_les, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &Gcc)
memberdef.name: get_les

para.bold: Returns the lesser component of a general contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the lesser component $ G^<(t_i,t_j) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ t_j$. For $ i > j$ the hermitian conjugate $G^\ddagger$ is used.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

parameterdescription.para: [cdmatrix] The lesser component (returned to an eigen3 matrix).

memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int j, std::complex< T > &G_les, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G)
memberdef.name: get_les

para.bold: Returns the lesser component of a hermitian contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the lesser component $ G^<(t_i,t_j) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ t_j$. For $ i > j$ the hermitian symmetry is assumed.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int j, std::complex< T > &G_les, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &Gcc)
memberdef.name: get_les

para.bold: Returns the lesser component of a general contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the lesser component $ G^<(t_i,t_j) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ t_j$. For $ i > j$ the hermitian conjugate $G^\ddagger$ is used.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

memberdef.argsstring: (const int m, cdmatrix &G_mat, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G)
memberdef.name: get_mat

para.bold: Returns the Matsubara component of a general contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the lesser component $ G^\mathrm{M}(\tau_m) $ at given imaginary time $ \tau_m$.
[int] Index of time $ \tau_m$ .

memberdef.argsstring: (const int m, cdmatrix &G_mat, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &Gcc)
memberdef.name: get_mat

para.bold: Returns the Matsubara component of a general contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the lesser component $ G^\mathrm{M}(\tau_m) $ at given imaginary time $ \tau_m$.
[int] Index of time $ \tau_m$ .

memberdef.argsstring: (const int m, std::complex< T > &G_mat, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G)
memberdef.name: get_mat

para.bold: Returns the Matsubara component of a general contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the lesser component $ G^\mathrm{M}(\tau_m) $ at given imaginary time $ \tau_m$.
[int] Index of time $ \tau_m$ .

memberdef.argsstring: (const int m, std::complex< T > &G_mat, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &Gcc)
memberdef.name: get_mat

para.bold: Returns the Matsubara component of a general contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the lesser component $ G^\mathrm{M}(\tau_m) $ at given imaginary time $ \tau_m$.
[int] Index of time $ \tau_m$ .

memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int j, cdmatrix &G_ret, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G)
memberdef.name: get_ret

para.bold: Returns the retarded component of a hermitian contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the retarded component $ G^\mathrm{R}(t_i,t_j) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ t_j$. We assume $G^\mathrm{R}(t_i,t_j)$ can be analytically continued to $ j > i$, for which the hermitian conjugate $G^\ddagger$ is used.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

parameterdescription.para: [cdmatrix] The retarded component (returned to an eigen3 matrix).

memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int j, cdmatrix &G_ret, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &Gcc)
memberdef.name: get_ret

para.bold: Returns the retarded component of a general contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the retarded component $ G^\mathrm{R}(t_i,t_j) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ t_j$. We assume $G^\mathrm{R}(t_i,t_j)$ can be analytically continued to $ j > i$, for which the hermitian conjugate $G^\ddagger$ is used.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

parameterdescription.para: [cdmatrix] The retarded component (returned to an eigen3 matrix).

memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int j, std::complex< T > &G_ret, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G)
memberdef.name: get_ret

para.bold: Returns the retarded component of a hermitian contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the retarded component $ G^\mathrm{R}(t_i,t_j) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ t_j$. We assume $G^\mathrm{R}(t_i,t_j)$ can be analytically continued to $ j > i$, for which the hermitian conjugate $G^\ddagger$ is used.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int j, std::complex< T > &G_ret, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &Gcc)
memberdef.name: get_ret

para.bold: Returns the retarded component of a general contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the retarded component $ G^\mathrm{R}(t_i,t_j) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ t_j$. We assume $G^\mathrm{R}(t_i,t_j)$ can be analytically continued to $ j > i$, for which the hermitian conjugate $G^\ddagger$ is used.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int m, cdmatrix &G_tv, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G)
memberdef.name: get_tv

para.bold: Returns the left-mixing component of a hermitian contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the left-mixing component $ G^\rceil(t_i,\tau_m) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ \tau_m$.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

parameterdescription.para: [cdmatrix] The left-mixing component (returned to an eigen3 matrix).

memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int m, cdmatrix &G_tv, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &Gcc)
memberdef.name: get_tv

para.bold: Returns the left-mixing component of a general contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the left-mixing component $ G^\rceil(t_i,\tau_m) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ \tau_m$.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

parameterdescription.para: [cdmatrix] The left-mixing component (returned to an eigen3 matrix).

memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int m, std::complex< T > &G_tv, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G)
memberdef.name: get_tv

para.bold: Returns the left-mixing component of a hermitian contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the left-mixing component $ G^\rceil(t_i,\tau_m) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ \tau_m$.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

memberdef.argsstring: (const int i, const int m, std::complex< T > &G_tv, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &Gcc)
memberdef.name: get_tv

para.bold: Returns the left-mixing component of a general contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the left-mixing component $ G^\rceil(t_i,\tau_m) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ \tau_m$.
[int] Index of time $ t_i$ .

memberdef.argsstring: (const int m, const int i, cdmatrix &G_vt, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G)
memberdef.name: get_vt

para.bold: Returns the right-mixing component of a hermitian contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the right-mixing component $ G^\lceil(\tau_m,t_i) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ \tau_m$ assuming hermitian symmetry.
[int] Index of time $ \tau_m$ .

parameterdescription.para: [cdmatrix] The right-mixing component (returned to an eigen3 matrix).

memberdef.argsstring: (const int m, const int i, cdmatrix &G_vt, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &Gcc)
memberdef.name: get_vt

para.bold: Returns the right-mixing component of a general contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the right-mixing component $ G^\lceil(\tau_m,t_i) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ \tau_m$. The hermitian conjugate $G^\ddagger$ is used.
[int] Index of time $ \tau_m$ .

parameterdescription.para: [cdmatrix] The right-mixing component (returned to an eigen3 matrix).

memberdef.argsstring: (const int m, const int i, std::complex< T > &G_vt, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G)
memberdef.name: get_vt

para.bold: Returns the right-mixing component of a hermitian contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the right-mixing component $ G^\lceil(\tau_m,t_i) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ \tau_m$ assuming hermitian symmetry.
[int] Index of time $ \tau_m$ .

memberdef.argsstring: (const int m, const int i, std::complex< T > &G_vt, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &G, herm_matrix_timestep_view< T > &Gcc)
memberdef.name: get_vt

para.bold: Returns the right-mixing component of a general contour function at given times.

blockquote.para: Returns the right-mixing component $ G^\lceil(\tau_m,t_i) $ at given times $ t_i$ and $ \tau_m$. The hermitian conjugate $G^\ddagger$ is used.
[int] Index of time $ \tau_m$ .
